title: Lead Revenue Manager at Sapphire Foods India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Sapphire Foods India
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India:
Sapphire Foods India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
